name: Peasant Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 14.5 ounce can tomatoes with liquid, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beans in a Dutch oven and cover with water. Bring to a boil.
2. Boil for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand for 1 hour.
3. Drain and rinse the beans; return them to the Dutch oven.
4. Add 6 cups water, carrots, celery, onions, garlic, bay leaves, tomatoes, basil, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 1-1/2 hours or until the beans are tender. Discard the bay leaves.
6. Add olive oil and heat through.
Yield: 12 servings (3 quarts)
Diabetic Exchanges: One 1-cup serving equals 1 vegetable, 1 starch, 1/2 lean meat, 1/2 fat; also 140 calories, 73 mg sodium, 0 cholesterol, 22 gm carbohydrate, 8 gm protein, 3 gm fat.
